methods.name: PrivateStorage
methods.signature: _TempStorage & cub::BlockScan< T, BlockDimX, Algorithm, BlockDimY, BlockDimZ >::PrivateStorage()

summary.text: Define the delegate type for the desired algorithm.
Shared memory storage layout type for
The thread block size in threads.
Ensure the template parameterization meets the requirements of the specified algorithm.

segments.text: Currently, the BLOCK_SCAN_WARP_SCANS policy cannot be used with thread block sizes not a multiple of the architectural warp size.

summary.text: require a temporary memory allocation of this nested type for thread communication. This opaque storage can be allocated directly using the
keyword. Alternatively, it can be aliased to externally allocated memory (shared or global) or
'd with other storage allocation types to facilitate memory reuse.
